channel.title: BinarySearch on Shivendra TechSter
channel.description: Recent content in BinarySearch on Shivendra TechSter

item.title: LeetCode 35: Search Insert Position Solution in Go
item.description: In this post we’ll solve and discuss the LeetCode problem no. 35 - Search Insert Position. We’ll be using Go language. The problem has the following description: Given a sorted array of distinct integers and a target value, return the index if the target is found. If not, return the index where it would be if it were inserted in order. You must write an algorithm with O(log n) runtime complexity"
